title: NYC Taxi and Limousine Commission Trip Record Data

official_entrypoints.label: NYC TLC Trip Record Data landing page
official_entrypoints.publisher: New York City Taxi and Limousine Commission

known_resource_patterns.note: Pattern is a source-prior hint. A resolver and probe must verify that a concrete URL exists before any route-agent resource plan is built.

verification_hints: Resolve official landing page or CDN object independently.
Probe content type and byte availability before treating the file as downloadable.
Validate schema and requested temporal coverage after download.
Do not use this card as benchmark-case answer data.
access_notes: NYC TLC publishes monthly trip records as public Parquet files and links NYC Open Data export options.
Legacy known_source compatibility remains source-prior only.
Monthly file patterns must be resolved and probed before route acceptance.
future_verification_hints: Confirm vehicle type, year, month, schema, and taxi-zone support resources.
Route-agent consumers must run resolver/probe/download/verifier separately.
migration_note: Legacy known_source entries for NYC TLC should become SourceCard metadata plus SourceSkill scripts that emit not-final route evidence.
